name: Вторая степень покоя
short_description: Read words and make choices as you immerse yourself in the adventures inside the protagonist's head. This dark visual novel tells the story of a lost man among corpses in a northern Russian town. Will you help the hero find a good ending? I don't know what to do with him anymore.
detailed_description:
Why should I play

Are you plagued by dreams?

Tired of work?

Do you see corpses every day?

Believe me, you are not alone. Our protagonist will share your suffering, and maybe even increase it.

Examine a piece of the thanatopractician's life under a microscope, help him figure out his love life and his head, make the most important life choices for him, solve riddles, interpret dreams and delight your ears with an authentic soundtrack.

This visual, yet literary and musical work is inspired by life in a post-Soviet city and the need to solve unsolvable riddles every day.
